data.body: DECISION: item 8 (module-size allowlist governance) REJECTED. Requiring human review on the allowlist adds too much friction for a soft code-quality gate. Chosen approach: the allowlist stays a RECORD, remediated periodically through maintenance sessions (like this audit). No ratchet / CODEOWNERS-gate / merge-base delta check. Item 9 (import-cycle SCC) APPROVED — all 3 sub-remediations.
